notes: set tactic NOT available in Lean 4 stdlib
norm_num tactic NOT available in Lean 4 stdlib
linarith NOT available, ring NOT available
split_ifs NOT available in Lean 4 stdlib - use by_cases
le_rfl NOT available - use Int.le_refl _ or Nat.le_refl _
variable {w hw} at module level conflicts with explicit (w : Nat) (hw : 0 < w) in function signatures
List.get_mem has signature: get l i in l (not get_mem l i _)
List.mem_replicate: a in replicate n x iff n != 0 and a = x; extract with .2
omega works for Nat.mod_lt and modular arithmetic
Unused theorem parameters: prefix with _ (e.g. _h, _ha0) to suppress linter warning
Unused simp args: remove from simp only [...] list to avoid linter warnings
List.mergeSort uses Bool comparator: def intLE (a b : Int) : Bool := if a <= b then true else false
For RBState where-block: omega cannot see struct parameter fields directly - use 'have h := field' to introduce into scope
rbPop_tail_eq_head_when_newest: use 'simp [rbPop_tail_eq]' not 'simp only [rbPop_tail_eq]' to reduce if-then-else
native_decide works for RBState with small concrete sizes (n=3)
hcnt in rbPop where-block needs: have h1 := s.hcnt; have h2 := _hi; omega
